infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tracks Taps uses your location to show your real-time position on the map and automatically verify when you reach location-based checkpoints during a tour.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tracks Taps requires access to your photo library so you can select and upload images (e.g., a photo of a landmark) to include in the custom city tours you create, or to set your user profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Tracks Taps requires permission to save photos to your gallery so that when you complete a photo challenge during a game (e.g., taking a picture of a statue), we can save your memory to your device's camera roll.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tracks Taps requires camera access so you can actively take photos during a tour to complete interactive photo challenges (e.g., snapping a picture of your team at a specific checkpoint) and to take photos for your custom tour listings.

plugins.photosPermission: Tracks Taps requires access to your photo library so you can select and upload images (e.g., a photo of a landmark) to include in the custom city tours you create, or to set your user profile.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Tracks Taps requires permission to save photos to your gallery so that when you complete a photo challenge during a game (e.g., taking a picture of a statue), we can save it to your camera roll.
